From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

UFC mixed martial arts event in 2007

| UFC 70: Nations Collide | |
| --- | --- |
| The poster for UFC 70: Nations Collide | |
| Promotion | [Ultimate Fighting Championship](/wiki/Ultimate_Fighting_Championship "Ultimate Fighting Championship") |
| Date | April 21, 2007 (2007-04-21) |
| Venue | [Manchester Evening News Arena](/wiki/Manchester_Evening_News_Arena "Manchester Evening News Arena") |
| City | [Manchester](/wiki/Manchester "Manchester"), United Kingdom |
| Attendance | 15,114 (12,708 paid)[[1]](#cite_note-1) |
| Total gate | $2,628,472 (£1.3 million [GBP](/wiki/Pound_sterling "Pound sterling"))[[2]](#cite_note-gate-2) |
| Event chronology | |
| |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | | [UFC 69: Shootout](/wiki/UFC_69 "UFC 69") | UFC 70: Nations Collide | [UFC 71: Liddell vs. Jackson 2](/wiki/UFC_71 "UFC 71") | | |

***UFC 70: Nations Collide*** was the second [UFC](/wiki/Ultimate_Fighting_Championship "Ultimate Fighting Championship") event held in the United Kingdom, and the first in [Manchester](/wiki/Manchester "Manchester") on Saturday, April 21, 2007. *UFC 70* was also only the seventh [UFC](/wiki/Ultimate_Fighting_Championship "Ultimate Fighting Championship") event held outside the United States, and the first since *[UFC 38](/wiki/UFC_38 "UFC 38")*. The card was broadcast live on pay-per-view in the United Kingdom and Ireland on [Setanta Sports](/wiki/Setanta_Sports "Setanta Sports").[[3]](#cite_note-3)

The televised card on [Spike TV](/wiki/Spike_(TV_network) "Spike (TV network)") drew a 1.84 overall rating (2.8 million viewers), and at its highest point, *UFC 70* drew 3.5 million viewers for the main event.[[4]](#cite_note-4)

## Background

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UFC_70&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Background")]

[2006 PRIDE Open-Weight Grand Prix Champion](/wiki/Pride_Final_Conflict_Absolute "Pride Final Conflict Absolute"), [Mirko Cro Cop](/wiki/Mirko_Cro_Cop "Mirko Cro Cop") fought [Heavyweight](/wiki/Heavyweight_(MMA) "Heavyweight (MMA)") contender [Gabriel Gonzaga](/wiki/Gabriel_Gonzaga "Gabriel Gonzaga") in the main event to determine the top contender for the [UFC Heavyweight Championship](/wiki/UFC_Heavyweight_Championship "UFC Heavyweight Championship") held by [Randy Couture](/wiki/Randy_Couture "Randy Couture").[[5]](#cite_note-Cro_Cop-5)

The card also featured [Michael Bisping](/wiki/Michael_Bisping "Michael Bisping") fighting in England for the [UFC](/wiki/Ultimate_Fighting_Championship "Ultimate Fighting Championship") for the first time against [UFC](/wiki/Ultimate_Fighting_Championship "Ultimate Fighting Championship") veteran [Elvis Sinosic](/wiki/Elvis_Sinosic "Elvis Sinosic") and [Andrei Arlovski](/wiki/Andrei_Arlovski "Andrei Arlovski") taking on prize fighter and training partner of [Mirko Cro Cop](/wiki/Mirko_Cro_Cop "Mirko Cro Cop") and future [UFC Heavyweight Champion](/wiki/UFC_Heavyweight_Champion "UFC Heavyweight Champion") [Fabrício Werdum](/wiki/Fabr%C3%ADcio_Werdum "Fabrício Werdum"), who was making his [UFC](/wiki/Ultimate_Fighting_Championship "Ultimate Fighting Championship") debut.

Reports have indicated that the [UFC](/wiki/Ultimate_Fighting_Championship "Ultimate Fighting Championship") was targeting this event for its debut on [HBO](/wiki/HBO "HBO"), but negotiations with [HBO](/wiki/HBO "HBO") were not completed in time for UFC 70. As a result, the card instead aired on [Spike TV](/wiki/Spike_TV "Spike TV") in North America at 9 pm EDT on a 6-hour tape delay.[[6]](#cite_note-6)

[Lyoto Machida](/wiki/Lyoto_Machida "Lyoto Machida") was originally scheduled to fight [Forrest Griffin](/wiki/Forrest_Griffin "Forrest Griffin") at this event, but Griffin is out, due to the [staph infection](/wiki/Staph_infection "Staph infection") and could not compete on the card.[[7]](#cite_note-7)

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=UFC_70&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Bonus awards")]
